name: adr009-comprehensive-audit
description: Audit all Mojo test files in a family/module for ADR-009 compliance when fixing one violation, create dedicated CI group. Use when: (1) fixing an ADR-009 violation in one file and sibling files may also exceed the ≤10 test limit, (2) no dedicated CI group exists for a test family, (3) split files are buried in an overloaded CI group.
